title: 阪神大賞典の後に・刺

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: You're so cool, Brian! Ahhh, look over here!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...If we leave now, we can probably catch an
earlier bullet train.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her attitude, Narita Brian has another
amazing race today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she keeps it up, she'll likely do well at the
spring Tenno Sho as well.

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh! Today's race was so good! Hey, are you
going to race in the spring Tenno Sho?

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Oh! I heard a rumor that the Sable Assassin is
going to be there! The racer with black hair and a
blue rose—Rice Shower!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
She's been an obstacle for both Mihono Bourbon
and Mejiro McQueen, so, yeah, I'd say she's
pretty strong!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: But we're rooting for you, so take her down for us!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I know training resumes tomorrow, but I'd
like you to make some adjustments for the spring
Tenno Sho.
choice_data_list: You want to enter the spring Tenno Sho?
You want to enter the spring Tenno Sho?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. If there's someone strong enough to be
called "the assassin," then I definitely want to see
what she's got.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
No, I don't just want to see what she's got. I want
to beat her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Black hair and a blue rose... There's no mistaking
that she matches the characteristics of the Sable
Assassin we've heard rumors of.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's true, "Sable Assassin" hardly seems like a
fitting name for such a petite and dainty girl.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But it won't be until the spring Tenno Sho that
we'll be able to see her strength with our own
eyes.
